pass_summaries.summary: Revised chapter 05 to tighten the consent-turn structure, reduce late-scene moral restatement, preserve the required mirror and dawn aftermath beats, and keep the domestic voice work in Sarah and Nate's existing register.

Line 53 lost a narrator label on her reaction. Line 59 lost a sentence explaining why the spatula joke worked. The chapter's domestic comedy now trusts line order, specificity, and Nate's response to carry the humor without gloss. All other dialogue, voice signatures, contraction levels, and scene texture unchanged.
